title: ferraria ovata
intro: Ferraria ovata, also known as the Leopard Lily or Ferraria, is a genus of flowering plants in the family Iridaceae, native to southern Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ferraria ovata include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
